content.en:
There was only one person left in the Traceless Territory.

However, before the entrance to the Traceless Territory disappeared, Ye Tian still let the clone go out and let the body take away some of the treasures carried by the clone.

For example, the Void God Leaf, this thing has a relatively high value and cannot be lost.

After that, the clone annihilated itself, and the replica body reunited in the Traceless Territory.

In this way, Ye Tian could boldly use the Rift Wind Valley to cultivate the Will World.

His replica body was at the very edge of Rift Valley, where the will impact was weakest, so the replica body could last for a long time without leaving Rift Valley.

And his doppelganger was surrounded by the Rift Valley, withstanding the violent impact of will, frantically beating his own will, and cooperating with the will world to cultivate.

In this way, the doppelganger collapsed again and again, and re-cultivated again and again, allowing Ye Tian to learn more about the world of will.

The will is not like cultivation, the will to copy the body and the doppelganger is improved, and the will of Ye Tian's body will also be improved, which is like an experience and understanding.

As the doppelganger collapsed again and again, the will was still improving, and the secret art of the will world gradually gained a lot of understanding, combined with Ye Tian's own situation, it became a secret art belonging to Ye Tian, and it was perfected step by step.

He wouldn't safely follow the Traceless Lord's secret technique to cultivate, it would easily collapse, and he would have to improve himself and adapt to his body before he could become a truly powerful will secret technique.

this day.

There is a new progress in the world of will, and he is ready to open up a world of will.

Once a world of will is opened, it means that the secret art of the world of will has reached the first level.

Ye Tian continued to condense his will through the secret technique of the will world, and opened up the will world in a certain cell in his body, the will world was not the real world, so even a cell could withstand the will world.

"World of Wills, open!"

The unknown dimension of the cell, a world of will has been forcibly opened up, and an infinite amount of will materializes in such a world.

At the same time, Ye Tian had complete control over this cell and was able to burst out with terrifying power.

Moreover, he was also able to use this cell as the core to radiate the entire body, so that the body burst out with much more powerful power than usual.

More importantly, the world of will has opened up, which can slowly strengthen the will, which is also a channel for the will to improve.

It is conceivable that once a large number of will worlds are opened, how fast will will be raised, and how strong will will will become?

I have to say that this Secret Technique of the Will World created by the Traceless Lord is indeed terrifying, but it's a pity that he doesn't dare to cultivate it himself.

The doppelganger succeeded in opening up the world of will, but the ontology naturally could not automatically open up the world of will.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian's body also needs to open up the world of will, and this process has been perfected, so there will be no danger.

Ye Tian began to open up the world of will in the Void Source Palace.

Soon, the ontology opened up the world of will successfully.

In the following days, Ye Tian's clone stayed in Rift Valley, and due to the opening up of the Will World, the will was strengthened, and he could stay in Rift Valley for a longer time.

Moreover, Ye Tian could go deeper into the depths of the Rift Wind Valley.

And just like that, another period passed.

On this day, Ye Tian began to open up the second world of will.

It's a pity that the opening of the second world of will failed.

Ye Tian quickly found the reason, it was influenced by the first will world, the first will world radiated the entire body, and the second will world was under the influence of the first will world, if it was still opened up like the first will world, it would inevitably fail.

The failure of the opening up of the world of will directly hit Ye Tian's will hard.

In desperation, Ye Tian annihilated this clone by himself, and then recondensed a clone, which was more convenient than slowly recovering his will.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to study how to create a second world of will, and found that it had a lot to do with the location of the chosen cells.

It can be said that the cell position chosen by each of the subsequent volitional worlds must conform to certain laws in order to avoid influence.

After many attempts, Ye Tiancai found a suitable position and opened up the Second Will World.

After the Second Will World was successfully opened, Ye Tian's body began to open up the Second Will World, and it was a one-time success, and there were no problems.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's copy body and clone had been in the Rift Valley for several tribulation times.

After such a long time, Ye Tian's clone still existed there, which was unimaginable in the eyes of Zhenhe Sword Ancestor and others, but no one knew.

At this time, Ye Tian had already opened up more than three hundred will worlds.

If you open up a thousand will worlds, it is equivalent to stepping into the second level of the secret art of the will world.

"According to the introduction of the secret art of the Will World, once the Will World reaches the second order, the will will will transform!" Ye Tian didn't know if this was true, but he really wanted to raise the Will World to the second order.

Now, he has a deeper understanding of the secret art of the world of will, and the speed at which he opens up the world of will is getting faster and faster.

Moreover, his doppelganger has come to the heart of the Rift Valley.

In this position, not many half-step Eternal Realms dared to come here, otherwise the will would be shattered by the impact.

Ye Tian knew very well that with his current level of will, he would not be able to get here, but more than three hundred will worlds radiated his body, and his impact on his will reached a very terrifying level, so he could come here.

this day.

Ye Tian really walked to the core of the Rift Valley, and here, he saw a boulder.

The boulder is gray in color and has dense lines on it, which are not engraved, but natural.

"The will impact of the Rift Valley should have emanated from this stone, that is to say, this stone created the vision of the Rift Valley!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He wanted to collect the stone, but found that he couldn't.

Obviously, the Traceless Lord has also set a ban on this stone, which is perfectly combined with the Traceless Territory and cannot be taken away.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged on this will stone, bearing the impact of his will while cultivating the will world.

Before you know it, another five years have passed.

At this time, the number of Ye Tian's will worlds reached 999, and only the last one was left, and he could reach the second order of the will world, causing the transformation of his will.

Bang!!!!

The 1,000th World of Will is born!

Ye Tian's will began to change qualitatively, and his will seemed to have stepped into a new level.

At this time.

The infinite cells on Ye Tian's body are all echoing the transformation of will, and his body exudes endless will brilliance, shining in the void in all directions.

After a long time, the metamorphosis of the will ended.

"The will has increased tenfold!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The will increase was very slow before, but this time the improvement is too terrifying!

Moreover, the will is more tenacious.

In addition, Ye Tian found that his will would become extremely sharp when he was blessed with fists or weapons, and he could easily tear apart the body of the half-step Eternal Realm.

Of course, this is Ye Tian who tested it with his own replica body.

Moreover, the will can also improve one's defense.

"After the will reaches the second order, it will be so terrifying, maybe the will of the eternal realm exists as well! the second order will should be equivalent to the will of the eternal realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

In short, after the will transformation reached the second order, his strength also transformed, at least comparable to the real One Pole Realm, not weaker than the True River Sword Ancestor and them.
